title: helichrysum somalense
intro: Helichrysum somalense, a flowering plant species within the sunflower family, is native to Somalia and is known for its bright yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum somalense include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum somalense can be prepared as an essential oil, capsule, or topical cream, which are used in aromatherapy, herbal supplements, and skincare products.
